box.title: Full-Cycle Textile Production
box.subtitle: Reliable manufacturing — from yarn to finished garments
box.p: Oltin Mato Group is a modern textile factory in Uzbekistan, integrating yarn production, fabric dyeing, and garment manufacturing with a strong commitment to quality and consistency.
box.video_text: Strict quality control at every stage — from raw materials to finished products.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: We create full-cycle textile production, combining technology and craftsmanship within a unified manufacturing process.
about.left_title: OLTIN MATO GROUP LLC has been active in the textile industry since 2006, fostering strong, long-term partnerships. Our philosophy is built on consistency, quality, and full transparency at every stage of the manufacturing process.
about.right_text: With our own cotton fields, we ensure complete quality control from the earliest stage — raw material cultivation. State-of-the-art equipment and advanced technologies guarantee exceptional standards in fabric production. Our experienced team transforms raw materials into high-quality, competitive textiles востребованные both locally and globally.

why_choose.subtitle: Our Strengths
why_choose.title: Reliability, exceptional quality, and truly uncompromising partnerships.

i_1.desc: Rigorous multi-stage quality control throughout the entire production process.

i_3.desc: Fair and transparent pricing with uncompromising quality

i_1.title: Tailored Solutions
i_1.desc: A flexible, client-centric approach to every project.

i_2.title: End-to-End Production
i_2.desc: Fully integrated manufacturing — from raw materials to finished goods.

i_3.title: Long-Term Vision
i_3.desc: Focused on sustainable partnerships and continuous growth.

globe.subtitle: Export Geography
globe.title: Global Partnership Today
globe.title_desc: OLTIN MATO GROUP is actively expanding its export направления, partnering with clients across key global regions. Our flexibility, consistent production volumes, and compliance with international standards enable us to handle orders of any complexity.

services.title_desc: OLTIN MATO GROUP is actively expanding its export направления, partnering with clients across key global regions. Our flexibility, consistent production volumes, and compliance with international standards enable us to handle orders of any complexity.

get_in_touch.title: International Certifications
get_in_touch.subtitle: Quality Assurance in Manufacturing
get_in_touch.p: OLTIN MATO GROUP is certified according to ISO and OEKO-TEX standards, demonstrating environmental responsibility, reliability, and transparency in production.

questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions.subtitle: Questions & Answers:
questions.box_title: Didn’t find the answer you were looking for? Contact us!

i_1.title: What types of products do you manufacture?
i_1.text: From yarn and fabric to finished garments.

i_2.title: Where is your textile produced?
i_2.text: At our own full-cycle production facilities in Uzbekistan.

i_3.title: Do you have quality certifications?
i_3.text: Yes, ISO and OEKO-TEX certifications confirm the environmental friendliness and safety of our products.

i_4.title: Is it possible to place a custom order?
i_4.text: Yes, we offer flexible solutions tailored to each client’s needs.

i_5.title: How quickly do you fulfill orders?
i_5.text: Lead times depend on the volume, but we ensure fast and efficient production.

i_6.title: Do you work with exports?
i_6.text: Yes, we cooperate with partners across the CIS, Europe, Asia, and South America.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: OLTIN MATO GROUP is a reliable partner in the textile industry, offering a full-cycle production process and attention to every detail.
about.left_title: OLTIN MATO GROUP is a dynamically growing leader in Uzbekistan’s textile industry, founded by professionals for whom quality and customer trust have always been top priorities. From the very beginning, our goal has been to create modern, competitive products that are in demand both in domestic and international markets.
about.right_text: Over the years, we have grown from a small enterprise into a large manufacturer with a full production cycle, continuously investing in technology, team development, and product range expansion. Our business is built on achievements, successful projects, and long-term partnerships that strengthen our position within the professional industry. A responsible approach, the implementation of global best practices, and care for our team enable us to produce textiles trusted by clients worldwide.

globe.subtitle: География экспорта
globe.title: Мировое партнёрство сегодня
globe.title_desc: OLTIN MATO GROUP активно развивает экспортные направления, сотрудничая с партнёрами в ключевых регионах мира. Гибкость, стабильные объёмы и соответствие международным стандартам позволяют нам работать с заказами любой сложности.

services.subtitle: Production Scale
services.title: From Cotton to Finished Textile
services.title_desc: Современное автоматизированное производство выпускает десятки тысяч метров полотен и изделий с стабильным качеством. Более 400 специалистов обеспечивают высокую производительность, гибкость и быструю реакцию на требования рынка.

tabs.title: 3070 Employees
tabs.text: Мы предлагаем широкий выбор высококачественных трикотажных полотен и готовых изделий. Изделия подходят как для массового производства, так и для индивидуальных заказов. Продукция охватывает сегменты от повседневной и корпоративной одежды до спортивной и специализированной.
